title: clinopodium multicaule var. shibetchense
intro: Clinopodium multicaule var. shibetchense, also known as Shibetsu Clinopodium, is a variety of the Clinopodium multicaule plant species, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Shibetsu Clinopodium include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
